# Ouroboros

> Ouroboros is the specification-first Agent OS for replayable, observable, policy-bound AI coding workflows.

## Canonical resources

- Website: https://ouroboros.page/
- Core repository and documentation: https://github.com/Q00/ouroboros
- Getting started: https://github.com/Q00/ouroboros/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md
- Runtime guides: https://github.com/Q00/ouroboros/tree/main/docs/runtime-guides
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/ouroboros-ai/
- Ourocode shell: https://github.com/Ouro-labs/ourocode
- Plugin ecosystem: https://github.com/Ouro-labs/ouroboros-plugins

## Core loop

Interview -> Seed -> Execute -> Evaluate -> Wonder -> Reflect -> next Seed

Ouroboros exposes assumptions before implementation, crystallizes intent into a Seed, executes through a replayable contract, evaluates outcomes, and feeds evidence into the next generation.

## Boundary

Ouroboros is an open-source developer tool. It is not affiliated with any cryptocurrency, memecoin, trading project, or similarly named token.
